narrative:
22 Ohio Senate district has 242,011 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.6% D−R vs -20.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
